claim_boundary: Computational dual-receptor docking-geometry surrogate challenger only; not binding, affinity, competition, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, or submission truth.

C1_SYMMETRIC12D_RIDGE.preprocessing: none beyond train-fold standardization inside Ridge pipeline

C2_INNER_TRAIN_PCA8_RIDGE.fit_scope: current inner-train parents only; outer refit uses current outer-train parents only
C2_INNER_TRAIN_PCA8_RIDGE.stack_rule: stack only fold-specific base predictions, never pooled fold-specific PCA coordinates

current_execution_boundary: Materialize and validate label-free 36D/12D only; do not train, evaluate, compare, or promote.
